calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-14-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-14-2007 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Linda Chavez.
David Briggs, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bethel Housing Corp. dba Freedom West Homes I and II.
Plaintiff's Witness: Paula Butler is also present in court.
Defendant: Renee Sweeney, present in pro per and with her son, Wallace Loggins.
Parties reached a settlement, terms read into the record as follows:
Defendant will pay the sum of $1,612.00 to Plaintiff on or before 5 P.M. of May 15, 2007.
Defendant's daughter, Ms. Agurs signed an agreement "Occupancy for drug free housing agreement" with the Plaintiff.
Defendant's son, Mr. Loggins signed an agreement "Limited Access to Private Property" with the Plaintiff, and to be filed as part of the file.
If Defendant complied with terms, Plaintiff will Dismissed with prejudice.
Parties agreed to terms, matter is deemed settled, Trial date vacated.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-07-2007 Continued To May-14-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
